meta.title: The wild plans to use the F-15EX in the early days of war
meta.description:
Go to https://ground.news/Sandboxx to stay fully informed on military developments around the world. Subscribe through my link right now for 40% off their Vantage Plan, which is what I use everyday.

– BREAK –

While the F-15EX lacks the stealth to serve as the tip-of-the-spear in a high-end fight, the aircraft is so broadly capable that the Air Force could potentially use it in several different ways until the airspace has been cleared enough for it to go on the prowl. 

You can read our full coverage of this story here: https://www.sandboxx.us/news/americas-f-15ex-could-wear-many-hats-in-a-21st-century-fight/

Make sure to follow Andrew Kelly on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/AndrewKelly.photos/
And check out his website: https://andrewk.photo/
